tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Creates one TickTick task in a project. Omit project_id to use the configured default project.

project_id.description: Optional project reference. May be a real project id, a project name, or a default-project alias such as inbox/default/входящие.

due_date.description: Optional due date or datetime. Relative dates should already be resolved before calling the tool.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be treated as an all-day task.

time_zone.description: Optional IANA timezone used to normalize due_date and start_date.

tools.name: create_task_with_subtasks
tools.description: Creates a parent task and its subtasks in one backend operation. Use this when the user asks for a task together with subtasks.

subtask_titles.description: Titles of subtasks to create under the new parent task.

project_id.description: Optional project reference for the parent task. Omit to use the configured default project.

content.description: Optional notes for the parent task.

due_date.description: Optional due date or datetime for the parent task.

start_date.description: Optional start date or datetime for the parent task.

is_all_day.description: Whether the parent task is all-day.

time_zone.description: Optional IANA timezone used to normalize parent task dates.

priority.description: TickTick priority value for the parent task.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Lists TickTick tasks and can filter by status, project, or search text.

project_id.description: Optional project reference to limit the task list.

search.description: Optional case-insensitive search matched against task title and notes.

tools.name: get_task_details
tools.description: Gets one TickTick task with its current fields.

tools.name: create_subtasks
tools.description: Creates subtasks under an existing parent task. The backend resolves the parent's project automatically.

titles.description: Titles of subtasks to create under the parent task.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Updates editable fields of one TickTick task.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be all-day.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to normalize new date fields.

project_id.description: Optional target project reference if the task should move.

tools.name: update_task_by_search
tools.description: Finds one open task by text and updates it only when the match is reliable.

search.description: Search text used to find the task by title or notes.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be all-day.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to normalize new date fields.

project_id.description: Optional project reference used as a search scope or move target.

prefer_due_date.description: Optional preferred local due date in YYYY-MM-DD when several tasks match.

prefer_today.description: Prefer a task due today when several tasks match.

exact_title.description: Require an exact title match before updating.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Lists TickTick projects and can filter them by id or name.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive filter by project name or id.

tools.name: list_upcoming_tasks
tools.description: Lists open tasks due soon, using localized dates for sorting and presentation.

days.description: How many days ahead to include.

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

include_overdue.description: Whether overdue tasks should be included.

include_without_due_date.description: Whether tasks without a due date should be appended after dated tasks.

project_id.description: Optional project reference to limit the list.

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Moves one task to another project.
